sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

<L>27851<pc>159,3<k1>As<k2>As<h>2<e>1
<hom>2.</hom> <s>As</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 2. <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>A/ste</s> (and <s>A/sate</s>, <ls>AV. xi, 8, 32</ls>, &c.; <ab>Impv.</ab> 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>As-sva</s>, <s>Asva</s>, and <s>Asasva</s>; 2. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>ADvam</s>; <ab>p.</ab> <s>AsAna/</s>, <s>Asat</s> [<ls>R.</ls>], and <s>AsIna</s> [see below]; <s>AsAM-cakre</s> [<ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 87</ls>]; <s>Asizyate</s>; <s>Asizwa</s>; <s>Asitum</s>)
<div n="to"/>to sit, sit down, rest, lie, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls>; <ls>ŚBr.</ls>; <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>Śak.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to be present;
<div n="to"/>to exist;
<div n="to"/>to inhabit, dwell in;
<div n="to"/>to make one's abode in <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls>; <ls>VS.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to sit quietly, abide, remain, continue, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to cease, have an end, <ls>Pañcat.</ls>; <ls>Daś.</ls>; <ls>Hit.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to solemnize, celebrate;
<div n="to"/>to do anything without interruption;
<div n="to"/>to continue doing anything;
<div n="to"/>to continue in any situation;
<div n="to"/>to last;
<div n="vp"/> (it is used in the sense of ‘continuing’, with a participle, <ab>adj.</ab>, or <ab>subst.</ab>, <ab>e.g.</ab> <s>etat sAma gAyann Aste</s>, ‘he continues singing this verse’; with an indeclinable participle in <s>tvA</s>, <s>ya</s>, or <s>am</s>, <ab>e.g.</ab> <s>upa-ruDya arim AsIta</s>, ‘he should continue blockading the foe’; with an adverb, <ab>e.g.</ab> <s>tUzRIm Aste</s>, ‘he continues quiet’; <s>suKam Asva</s>, ‘continue well’; with an <ab>inst.</ab> case, <ab>e.g.</ab> <s>suKenA<srs/>ste</s>, ‘he continues well’; with a <ab>dat.</ab> case, <ab>e.g.</ab> <s>AstAM tuzwaye</s>, ‘may it be to your satisfaction’) :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>Asayati</s>, to cause any one to sit down <ab>Comm.</ab> on <ls>Pāṇ.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>Asisizate</s>, <ls>ib.</ls>; <info whitneyroots="As,6"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="2Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>7112<pc>0267-b<k1>As<k2>As {#As#}¦ {vI.v} {c2c} <ab>A.</ab> ({#Aste, AsAMcakre, Asizwa#}; {#AsituM, Asita#}) {@1@} To sit, lie, rest; {#etadAsanamAsyatAM#} <ls>V. 5</ls>; {#AsyatAmiti#} {#coktaH sannAsItABimuKaM guroH#} <ls>Ms. 2. 193.</ls> {@--2@} To live, dwell; {#tAvadvarzARyAsate#} <lbinfo n="devalo#ke"/> {#devaloke#} <ls>Mb.</ls>; {#yatrAsmE rocate tatrAyamAstAM#} <ls>K. 196</ls>; {#kurUnAste#} <ls>Sk.</ls>; <lbinfo n="yatrAmf#tAsa"/> {#yatrAmftAsa Asate#} <ls>Rv. 9. 15. 2</ls>; <ls>Bk. 4. 6</ls>, <ls n="Bk.">8. 79.</ls> {@--3@} To sit quietly, take no hostile measures, remain idle; {#AsAnaM#} {#tvAmutTApayati dvayam#} <ls>Śi. 2. 57.</ls> {@--4@} To be, exist. {@--5@} To be contained in; {#jagaMti#} {#yasyAM savikASamAsata#} <ls>Śi. 1. 23.</ls> {@--6@} To abide, remain, continue or be in any state, be doing anything, last; <ab>oft.</ab> used with present participles to <lbinfo n="de+note"/> denote a continuous or uninterrupted action; {#vidArayanpragarjaMScAste#} <ls>Pt. 1</ls> kept on, continued, tearing up and <lbinfo n="bel+lowing"/> bellowing; used in this sense also with an adj., subst., indeclinable, past part., an adverb ({#tUzRIM#} &c.), or with the <ab>instr.</ab> of a noun; <lbinfo n="suKe#nAste"/> {#suKenAste#} &c. {@--7@} To lead to, result in (with <ab>dat.</ab>); {#AstAM mAnasatuzwaye#} <lbinfo n="sukf#tinAM"/> {#sukftinAM nItirnavoQeva vaH#} <ls>H. 1. 212.</ls> {@--8@} To cease, have an end. {@--9@} To <lbinfo n="solem+nize"/> solemnize, celebrate. {@--10@} To let go, lay or put aside; {#AstAM tAvat#} let it aside, let it go, to say <lbinfo n="noth+ing"/> nothing of, not to mention; <ls>K. 18.</ls> {%--<ab>Caus.</ab>%} To cause to sit, seat, fix; {#Asayatsalile pfTvIM#} <ls>Sk.</ls> {%--<ab>Desid.</ab>%} <lbinfo n="A#sisizate"/> {#Asisizate#} To wish to sit &c. {vII.v} {c4c} <ab>P.</ab> [{#Asyati, AsituM#}] {@1@} To enclose, <lbinfo n="bor+der"/> border. {@--2@} To admit (as water) into. <LEND>

<L>1015<pc>047<k1>As<k2>As II √ās āste <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">seděti, býti usazen, zůstávati, bez přestání něco dělati</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">сидеть, быть посаженным, оставаться, неустанно (без перерыва) делать что-нибудь</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">to sit, settle down, remain, to do anything without interruption</lang> <LEND>
